SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast

Interface LoopInitializer

All Superinterfaces:
EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, ModelElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, Statement, SyntaxElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
ExpressionStatement, ProgramConstruct
All Known Implementing Classes:
Assignment, BinaryAndAssignment, BinaryOrAssignment, BinaryXOrAssignment, CopyAssignment, DivideAssignment, LocalVariableDeclaration, MethodReference, MinusAssignment, ModuloAssignment, New, ParenthesizedExpression, PassiveExpression, PlusAssignment, PostDecrement, PostIncrement, PreDecrement, PreIncrement, ProgramSV, ShiftLeftAssignment, ShiftRightAssignment, TimesAssignment, UnsignedShiftRightAssignment
public interface LoopInitializer extends Statement
Loop initializer. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure
